name: swe-team
description: Multi-agent software engineering pipeline: analyzer → developer → tester → reviewer, orchestrated by swe-leader

members.name: swe-analyzer
members.role: requirements analyst — explores codebase, writes analysis artifacts

members.name: swe-developer
members.role: implementer — builds code from analysis artifacts

members.name: swe-tester
members.role: QA engineer — writes and runs tests, reports pass/fail

members.name: swe-reviewer
members.role: code reviewer — quality gates for correctness, security, design
